userStories.title: Pausa carousel quando si apre un Read more
userStories.description: As a visitor, when I click Read more on a card the carousel should stop; when I click Read less it should resume.
acceptanceCriteria: Declare a shared boolean `cardOpen = false` near the existing `paused` variable in the carousel JS block
In the RAF loop condition, stop scrolling if `paused || cardOpen` is true
In the card expand/collapse JS block, when opening (expanded === false): set `cardOpen = true`
userStories.notes: The carousel RAF JS and the card toggle JS are separate blocks in index.html. The `cardOpen` variable must be declared in the carousel block (before the RAF function) so both blocks can access it — or declare it at the top level outside both blocks. Use `var cardOpen = false` so it is function-scoped to the script tag.
